string 2: The Card Shop is under construction.

What's this? You guys out here cosplaying? Love the
commitment to your craft!

You're looking for a lady in a lab coat? Fine. Twist my arm,
why don't you! I'll just open up my third eye here, and—
Huh? N-No, thanks, you say? I... I see...

My inner abyss starts to throb in the face of this place.
Must... hold it... back!

Limited-time Sairyugu seasonal special!
Mega Macho Ramen!
Flavor That Makes You Flex!

A rhythm game player fell to pieces after making a single
mistake!
Those pastries smell amazing!
...On second thought, never mind. Inori would get mad.
If that's not a guilty pleasure, I don't know what is.

Looks delicious... But eating that now would spoil your
appetite.

Rumor has it the burgers here are anomaly-grade
delicious. They certainly smell very appetizing.
There's a man staring at some expensive-looking equipment.

The woman standing next to him looks just about ready to
blow her top.
{fs50}Berry's the best!
What the heck was that all about? My poor ears!
It's a harsh reality that trends come and go.

One of the card game players is really getting into it, acting
like an anime character.

There are so many manga and anime magazines. It must be
hard collecting an entire series.

Someone just shuffled out of the arcade like a member
of the undead!
Plastic models and figures are lined up on display.
Such beautiful modeling...
All of the yummy-looking foods are making my mouth water.

The food in this world looks delicious, too. How about we
go in?
I'd love to, but... we'd better find Dr. Simmons first.

Hmm? Someone in a lab coat? Haven't the faintest~
Oh, take this! Stop by our cafe anytime.

Come to our cafe, would you? I'll make a special drink,
just for you!

Hmm? Someone in a lab coat? Haven't the faintest... Oh,
take this! Stop by our cafe anytime.
Sheesh, what's taking him so long? Is he lost or something?

What's that? A lady in a lab coat? No one comes to mind...
But while you're here, why not sample our baked goods?
Treat yourself to a slice of cake? You won't regret it.

Ooh! Are you cosplaying from a new anime? When does
this one air?!

Hmm? A woman in a lab coat? You must mean the one who
always frequents the junk shop.

I saw her under the overpass just a minute ago. You know,
the road by that drugstore?

Sounds like she's at the junk shop under the overpass.
Let's go take a look!

The junk shop is on the road by the drugstore. Good luck
finding that lady!
Come visit anytime! I'll make your drink with love. I promise!

A lady in a lab coat? Hmm. It could be the lady I always
see at the junk shop.

I saw her under the overpass just a minute ago. You know,
that road by that drugstore?

Sounds like she's at the junk shop under the overpass. Let's
go take a look!

The junk shop is on the road by the drugstore. Good luck
finding that lady!

Hold on. Is this where I was supposed to meet him? Oh, well.
He'll probably show up here sooner or later.
Wh-What? A lady in a lab coat? N-Nope... haven't seen her.

I hope she's the prim and proper type. Can't go wrong with
a tomboy, though... Hmm, or maybe the aloof type?
Sorry. Whatever you're selling, I'm not buying.

...Oh, you're looking for someone? A woman in a lab coat?
Can't say I've seen her. Try someone else, maybe?

Dr. Simmons is in a lab coat, right? I think it would stand
out. Let's go ask around if anyone has seen her.
The shop isn't very busy right now. How about a match?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
No problem. Hope to see you again sometime.
Rats! I'd better go back to Card Battle 101.

Looks like I win. How about buying some new cards if you
want to beat me?

Now that I've collected all these cards, I wanna use 'em in
a match. Wanna play a game?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
No worries. I'll find someone else.
Darn! It stinks to lose, but that was still pretty fun!
Whoa, I actually won! It's pretty fun playin' against someone!

How about a match against my high-rarity deck? C'mon! Let me
show off a little.
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
I understand. I'll try asking someone else.
Did my high-rarity cards just lose...? I can't believe it...

Ha ha! Not only are my cards beautiful, but they're winning
cards, too! They were worth spending my whole paycheck on!

What? I thought you went to investigate for me. I can't
leave this spot, you know. Go on. Get to searching!

The weapon is probably in the process of being transported
to the government building as we speak.

We can't let them use that thing! You have to go after them,
and fast!

But the government building is currently on lockdown.
How are they going to get in?

There must be a way... How about asking a Digimon to
take them there?

Okay. I sometimes see one on the roof of a building in the
shopping district when I come up out of Rebellion Village.

I'm not sure what they're doing up there...
but I bet you'll run into them if you head that way.

Very good... In that case, please go ask that Digimon
to take you to the government building.

We'll go ahead and return to Rebellion
Village and prepare for support.

It's a dangerous mission... but you're the
only ones who can do this. I wish you luck.

We'll see each other again, for sure. Be careful on
your way back to the roof of your home as well.

Next on the agenda is... Shinjuku Park. I
might as well grab some for the doctor, too.

I still have some time before I have to go to work... Um, if
you wouldn't mind, would you like to have... a card battle?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
No, huh...? Man, I don't want to go to work...
Looks like I win! This is my lucky day!
I lost... Darn it. I don't want to go to work feeling this down...
